title: Scholarly Retrieval System — cross-disciplinary research library with a twelve-stage analytical-governance plane

fields.vision: A local scholarly retrieval and evidence-review system, not merely a searchable library.
fields.mechanism: It separates the local corpus plane, retrieval plane, and twelve-stage analytical-governance plane: corpus admission and extraction feed sparse, dense, and semantic indexes; hybrid fusion, metadata filters, domain-aware subcorpora, reranking, and chunk-window expansion shape retrieval; query decomposition, evidence retrieval, seven-stage evidence curation, evidence scoring, analyst drafting, citation validation, claim registration, claim-gap review, follow-up query planning, contradiction review, red-team review, abstention-capable final decision, traceability, release, and source-influence tracking govern what can be said.
fields.built_components: The system is live today against roughly four thousand committed books and has been growing the queryable searchable view by an order of magnitude per month, but the corpus admission pipeline is stuck — well over a hundred and forty thousand discovered records sit in a "stable" holding state, blocked by a write-lock contention pattern in the manifest that exhibits as burst-then-die behavior. Until that is resolved, the analytical governance plane is governing over a deliberately under-admitted library. The retrieval indices behind the live four thousand books are large and exercised — sparse and dense indices both, fused by reciprocal-rank fusion — and the analytical-governance discipline above them runs in production end-to-end, refusing to write past its evidence and surfacing contradictions before drawing conclusions. The system is available to a query at any time through three local services, and the discipline is the same on every query. The open questions are equally explicit. There is no bibliographic-identity layer yet, so the system cannot reliably distinguish a work from an edition from a translation from a duplicate. There is no learned reranker — only RRF plus keyword boost — which means relevance ordering is competent but not optimized. And retrieval evaluation has no corpus-derived gold set yet, which means retrieval quality is currently inferred from analytical-stage behavior rather than measured directly. The project's own pre-published diagnosis "The software architecture is ahead of the corpus architecture; plane 3 is disproportionately advanced relative to plane...
fields.source_utilization: Source use is organized by role: method authorities, domain evidence, technical background, implementation evidence, and claim limits. The page should show why each source matters; direct quotations and stronger factual claims still require exact passage anchors before publication.
fields.plan: Convert the library system from a thing analysts use into a thing the defensive retrieval-augmented generation research program runs against — with the twelve-stage analytical-governance plane as the page under attack. The order is dictated by what the experiment needs to be valid, not by what is fastest to ship. Step 01 Corpus admission fix Resolve the manifest write-lock contention; drain the stable-state backlog. No inference about governance behavior generalizes against a depleted corpus. Step 02 Poison-injection harness Added to the Corpus plane with full provenance — every injected poisoned token recoverable; experiment reproducible. Step 03 Per-stage instrumentation Each of the twelve analytical-governance stages logs its detection rate against injected poison. The instrumentation is what turns the plane into a measurable defensive structure. Step 04 Matched-pair experiment The disciplined twelve-stage plane against a naive retrieval-augmented generation control, run across the poison classes specified in Row 14. Step 05 Retrieval plane completion Reranker, retrieval evaluation, chunk-window expansion. Retrieval quality is a confound; unmeasured retrieval variance is unmeasured experimental variance. Step 06 Corpus plane completion Bibliographic identity, OCR-quality governance, internal metadata extraction. Corpus integrity is the other confound; an unidentified duplicate is unmeasured corpus variance.
fields.status: Status: The system is live today against roughly four thousand committed books and has been growing the queryable searchable view by an order of magnitude per month, but the corpus admission pipeline is stuck — well over a hundred and forty thousand discovered records sit in a "stable" holding state, blocked by a write-lock contention pattern in the manifest that exhibits as burst-then-die behavior.
fields.remaining_gaps: Remaining gaps: convert the library system from a thing analysts use into a thing the defensive retrieval-augmented generation research program runs against — with the twelve-stage analytical-governance plane as the page under attack. The order is dictated by what the experiment needs to be valid, not by what is fastest to ship.
fields.detailed_source_vision: A scholarly evidence-retrieval and argumentative-extraction environment that runs entirely on local hardware, calls no external service, and is built around the rule that an answer is only as defensible as the citations it carries. The system is organized as three stacked architectural planes — a Corpus plane that decides what the library is , a Retrieval plane that decides what pages in response to a query, and an Analytical Governance plane that turns retrieved evidence into a written answer under a discipline that can refuse to answer. The re-targeted vision treats the governance plane as a page to be attacked: the research-library system becomes the foundation for poison-injection experiments where the empirical question is which of the twelve governance stages catches an injected poison and which lets it through.
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: Each plane is a separate discipline operating on the output of the plane beneath it. The component grids below show what is built, what is partial, and what is not built within each plane.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: A local scholarly retrieval and evidence-review system, not merely a searchable library.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: It separates the local corpus plane, retrieval plane, and twelve-stage analytical-governance plane: corpus admission and extraction feed sparse, dense, and semantic indexes; hybrid fusion, metadata filters, domain-aware subcorpora, reranking, and chunk-window expansion shape retrieval; query decomposition, evidence retrieval, seven-stage evidence curation, evidence scoring, analyst drafting, citation validation, claim registration, claim-gap review, follow-up query planning, contradiction review, red-team review, abstention-capable final decision, traceability, release, and source-influence tracking govern what can be said.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It matters because RAG quality depends on the whole evidence path, not only the final answer; the system makes sparse and semantic retrieval, evidence support, citation validity, abstention, contradiction, source influence, and refusal-to-answer discipline inspectable before a research claim is trusted. Its current limit is also explicit: corpus ingestion remains the weak plane to repair before using the library as a full defensive-retrieval testbed.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: rendered correction table.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.

Its current limit is also explicit: corpus ingestion remains the weak plane to repair before using the library as a full defensive-retrieval testbed.

instruments.input: books, PDFs, Calibre records, manifests, root paths, source hashes, and status classes
instruments.operation: decides what belongs in the scholarly corpus, what is stable but unprocessed, what is committed, and what remains excluded or failed
instruments.output: admitted corpus records plus holding, failed, and promotion states
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires books, PDFs, Calibre records, manifests, root paths, source hashes, and status classes
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds admitted corpus records plus holding, failed, and promotion states; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.
instruments.proof: Expected proof artifact: admitted corpus records plus holding, failed, and promotion states
instruments.status: Status: The system is live today against roughly four thousand committed books and has been growing the queryable searchable view by an order of magnitude per.

instruments.verification_check: Run one corpus query or source-admission fixture through Root Registry And Corpus Admission; confirm source identity, retrieval path, support state, and output: admitted corpus records plus holding, failed....

instruments.input: evidence packet, source support state, contradiction state, and user query
instruments.operation: refuses or narrows answers when the corpus cannot support the requested claim; the step records the decision path so the reader can see how the project moves from input to governed output.
instruments.output: answer, qualified answer, follow-up search plan, or refusal
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires evidence packet, source support state, contradiction state, and user query
